focus: whether to go ahead with the choice they are weighing
cardReadingDirection: Yes — do it, because Justice upright shows the decision is fair and will hold up once you act on it honestly. Card 1 (Justice) = the choice the user is weighing will work out if it is handled through clear, explicit agreements — spell out the terms, responsibilities, and consequences with anyone involved rather than moving on vague understandings. Justice also warns that the outcome will mirror the fairness of the user's own conduct, so proceed only in the version of this plan where everything is above board and nothing needs to be hidden. Momentum should be steady and well-paced rather than dramatic — take the first formal step now instead of waiting for a grand moment. Practical advice: today, write down exactly what doing it involves, confirm the key terms in writing with the other people affected, and then commit to the decision without second-guessing it.
